# Legal Advance Solution (LAS)
> AI-Powered Legal Research System for Thai Business Law

## About
Legal Advance Solution Co., Ltd. (LAS) provides AI-powered legal research and advisory services specializing in Thai corporate law, real estate, PDPA compliance, contract drafting, due diligence, and investment structuring. Founded by Thundthornthep Yamoutai, Ph.D., a business lawyer with 20+ years of experience.

## Practice Areas
- Corporate & Business Law
- Real Estate & Property Development
- PDPA Data Protection Compliance
- Contract Drafting & Review
- Due Diligence & Conditions Precedent
- Joint Venture & M&A
- Labour & Employment Law
- Intellectual Property
- Hotel & Hospitality Law
- BOI & EEC Investment
- Government Regulatory Advisory
